description_long: This is a rustic wooden tankard or mug, constructed from vertically aligned wooden staves bound together by two wide, dark metal bands—one near the top and one near the bottom. The wood displays a natural grain pattern, giving it an authentic, hand-crafted appearance. A prominent, curved metal handle is attached to one side, designed for easy gripping and featuring a squared-off end. The top is open, revealing the hollow interior, while the base is flat and sturdy, suitable for resting on tables or counters. The metal bands and handle have a slightly weathered, matte finish, suggesting durability and frequent use. This object evokes a medieval or fantasy aesthetic, making it suitable for tavern, pub, or themed urban settings.
description: A rustic wooden tankard with metal bands and a large curved metal handle, featuring visible wood grain and an open top.
description_view_0: The tankard is seen at an angle, highlighting the curved metal handle and the wood grain texture of the staves.
description_view_1: The tankard is viewed directly from the back, showing the full length of the metal handle and the symmetry of the metal bands.
description_view_2: The tankard is seen from the opposite side of the handle, displaying the uninterrupted wooden staves and both metal bands.
description_view_3: The tankard is viewed from the front, with the open top and circular arrangement of wooden staves clearly visible.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
